spec_match.rationale: The lab now names and tests the modulepreload destinations as="json" and as="style", contrasts regular rel="preload", and surfaces MIME, integrity, credentials, and later-import reuse contracts.

interactive.rationale: The page has live attribute probes, generated Blob-backed modulepreload injection, and a contract lab whose rel/as/MIME/import/integrity/credentials controls update results immediately.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature-index blurb promises compatibility detection and fallback patterns; the revised lab preserves those and adds concrete spec-contract cases.

edge_cases.rationale: The lab covers unsupported destinations, the rel=preload JSON exclusion, wrong MIME, missing later imports, destination mismatch, integrity metadata, and credentials-cache reuse.

references.rationale: The page includes the required https://chromestatus.com/feature/5202661416763392 link plus HTML Standard and WHATWG references.

design_system.rationale: The raw badge colors were replaced with shared design tokens, and local controls use the repository variables.

summary: The missing ChromeStatus link, raw-color cleanup, and shallow spec-surface finding are resolved by the new modulepreload contract lab.
